content: <1>Web search</1> — AI fetches real-time information from the web when needed for your request.

comment.text: This key provides a tooltip explaining how AI services access real-time web information to fulfill user requests. It appears within the AI service pricing section of the Portal Settings, specifically within the Payments > SaaS > Services area. Translators should focus on conveying the "real-time web search" functionality.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase '<1>Web vyhledávání</1>' is grammatically incorrect in Czech. It is a literal word-for-word translation of 'Web search' that results in a noun-noun cluster that doesn't function as a proper term. It should be '<1>Vyhledávání na webu</1>' or '<1>Webové vyhledávání</1>' to be meaningful.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Vyhledávání na webu</1> — AI získává informace v reálném čase z webu, když jsou pro váš požadavek nutné.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Vēbmesoja' is a mistranslation. 'Mesoja' is not a standard Latvian word in this context; it appears to be a hallucination or a typo for 'meklēšana' (search). 'Vēbmeklēšana' is the correct term for 'Web search'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Vēbmeklēšana</1> — AI izgūst real-time informāciju no tīmekļa, kad tas ir nepieciešams jūsu pieprasīšanai.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in gender agreement: 'váš žiadosť' is incorrect; 'žiadosť' is a feminine noun, so it must be 'vašu žiadosť'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Web vyhľadávanie</1> — AI získava aktuálne informácie z internetu, keď je to potrebné pre vašu žiadosť.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'Web search' is translated as 'Iskliški iskalnik', which literally means 'Search engine searcher' or 'Search engine tool', making it redundant and semantically incorrect in this context. It should be 'Iskanje po spletu'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Iskanje po spletu</1> — AI pridobi informacije v realnem času iz spletja, ko so potrebne za vaš zahtev.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'реално време информација' is grammatically incorrect and semantically awkward in Serbian; it translates literally to 'real time information' in a way that breaks the noun-adjective relationship. It should be 'информације у реалном времену'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: <1>Претрага на Вебу</1> — AI прикупља информације у реалном времену са веба када је то потребно за ваш захтев.
